Test_Objective: Verify dropdown opens when user clicks the avatar in the header
Precondition: User is authenticated and on any page with the header
Steps: 1. Click the user avatar in the header.
Expected_Result: Dropdown is displayed with two items: "Profile" (with user icon) and "Logout" (with chevron-right icon). Dropdown appears below the avatar with open animation (opacity + translateY, 150ms).

Test_Objective: Verify no duplicate dropdowns appear on double-click
Precondition: User is authenticated and on any page with the header
Steps: 1. Double-click the user avatar in the header.
Expected_Result: Only one dropdown instance is displayed. No duplicate or flickering behavior.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown can be opened via keyboard (Tab + Enter)
Precondition: User is authenticated and on any page with the header
Steps:
1. Press Tab to navigate focus to the avatar.
2. Press Enter.
Expected_Result: Dropdown is displayed correctly with focus on the first item (Profile).

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown can be opened via Space key
Precondition: User is authenticated and on any page with the header
Steps:
1. Press Tab to navigate focus to the avatar.
2. Press Space.
Expected_Result: Dropdown is displayed correctly with focus on the first item (Profile).

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown closes when clicking outside
Precondition: Dropdown is open
Steps: 1. Click on any area outside the dropdown.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes with close animation (opacity + translateY, 100ms). No action is performed.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown closes when Escape key is pressed
Precondition: Dropdown is open
Steps: 1. Press the Escape key.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes. No action is performed. Focus returns to the avatar.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown closes after an item is clicked
Precondition: Dropdown is open
Steps: 1. Click the "Profile" menu item.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes. Navigation to /profile occurs.

Test_Objective: Verify avatar click toggles dropdown open/close
Precondition: Dropdown is open
Steps: 1. Click the avatar again.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes. Clicking avatar once more re-opens it.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown is not accessible when user is not logged in
Precondition: User is not authenticated (no session)
Steps:
1. Navigate to /login.
2. Observe the header area.
Expected_Result: No avatar is displayed. No dropdown trigger is available.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown is accessible from any page with the header
Precondition: User is authenticated
Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click the avatar.
3. Close dropdown.
4. Navigate to another page.
5. Click the avatar.
Expected_Result: Dropdown opens correctly on all authenticated pages with the same content and behavior.

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown container displays correctly per design specs
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar to open dropdown.
2. Observe the container.
Expected_Result: Dropdown container displays with: dark background (#00070C), gold border (1px solid #998C5F), border-radius 8px, padding 6px, flex column layout. Positioned absolutely below the avatar.

Test_Objective: Verify the Profile menu item displays correctly in default state
Precondition: User is authenticated and NOT on the profile page. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Observe the "Profile" item.
Expected_Result: Profile item shows: label "Profile" in white (#FFFFFF), Montserrat 16px Bold, letter-spacing 0.15px. User icon (24x24px, white) displayed. Item height 56px, padding 0 16px, border-radius 4px. Background transparent.

Test_Objective: Verify the Profile item shows active state when on the profile page
Precondition: User is authenticated and on /profile. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Navigate to /profile.
2. Click the avatar.
3. Observe the "Profile" item.
Expected_Result: Profile item shows active state: gold-tinted background (rgba(255,234,158,0.10)), gold glow text shadow (0 4px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), 0 0 6px #FAE287).

Test_Objective: Verify the Logout menu item displays correctly
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Observe the "Logout" item.
Expected_Result: Logout item shows: label "Logout" in white (#FFFFFF), Montserrat 16px Bold, letter-spacing 0.15px. Chevron-right icon (24x24px, white). Item height 56px, padding 0 16px, border-radius 4px. Background transparent. No text shadow/glow.

Test_Objective: Verify menu items appear in correct order
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Observe the order of items.
Expected_Result: Profile item appears first (top), Logout item appears second (bottom).

Test_Objective: Verify the Profile item hover visual effect
Precondition: User is authenticated and NOT on /profile. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Hover over the "Profile" item.
Expected_Result: Background changes to gold-tinted (rgba(255,234,158,0.10)) with 150ms ease-in-out transition. Cursor changes to pointer.

Test_Objective: Verify the Logout item hover visual effect
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Hover over the "Logout" item.
Expected_Result: Background changes to gold-tinted (rgba(255,234,158,0.10)) with 150ms ease-in-out transition. Cursor changes to pointer.

Test_Objective: Verify focus indicator displays on keyboard navigation
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open via keyboard.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown via keyboard.
2. Press ArrowDown to move focus between items.
Expected_Result: Focused item shows outline: 2px solid #FFEA9E with 2px offset. Focus moves from Profile to Logout.

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown open animation
Precondition: User is authenticated.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar to open dropdown.
2. Observe the animation.
Expected_Result: Dropdown appears with opacity fade-in and translateY from -4px to 0, duration 150ms, ease-out easing.

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown close animation
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click outside the dropdown.
2. Observe the animation.
Expected_Result: Dropdown disappears with opacity fade-out and translateY from 0 to -4px, duration 100ms, ease-in easing.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown avoids viewport overflow on mobile
Precondition: User is authenticated on a mobile device (320px width).
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Observe dropdown position.
Expected_Result: Dropdown is fully visible within the viewport. Right-aligned to prevent overflow. All items are readable and tappable (min 44x44px touch target).

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown displays correctly when page is zoomed
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Zoom in to 150%.
3. Observe.
4. Zoom out to 75%.
5. Observe.
Expected_Result: Dropdown displays without layout break or overflow at both zoom levels.

Test_Objective: Verify icons display correctly per design specs
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Observe the user icon on Profile item.
3. Observe the chevron-right icon on Logout item.
Expected_Result: User icon: 24x24px, #FFFFFF color, 8px gap from text. Chevron-right icon: 24x24px, #FFFFFF color, 8px gap from text.

Test_Objective: Verify text styling is consistent across both menu items
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Inspect text styling of both items.
Expected_Result: Both items use: Montserrat font, 16px size, 700 weight, 24px line-height, 0.15px letter-spacing, #FFFFFF color.

Test_Objective: Verify clicking Profile navigates user to /profile
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Click "Profile" item.
Expected_Result: User is navigated to the profile page (/profile). Dropdown closes. Page loads correctly.

Test_Objective: Verify Profile item shows active state when user is on profile page
Precondition: User is authenticated and on /profile.
Steps:
1. Navigate to /profile.
2. Click the avatar to open dropdown.
Expected_Result: Profile item displays with active state: gold-tinted background and gold glow text shadow.

Test_Objective: Verify Profile item does NOT show active state on non-profile pages
Precondition: User is authenticated and on the home page (not /profile).
Steps:
1. Navigate to a non-profile page.
2. Click the avatar.
Expected_Result: Profile item displays in default state (transparent background, no gold glow).

Test_Objective: Verify clicking Logout calls signOut() and redirects to /login
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Click "Logout" item.
Expected_Result: Supabase signOut() is called. Session is cleared. User is redirected to /login. Dropdown closes.

Test_Objective: Verify logout completes and redirects within 2 seconds
Precondition: User is authenticated. Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Click the avatar.
2. Click "Logout".
3. Measure time until /login is displayed.
Expected_Result: Redirect to /login completes within 2 seconds.

Test_Objective: Verify no auth state leaks remain after logout
Precondition: User has just logged out.
Steps:
1. Log out via dropdown.
2. Navigate to a protected page via URL.
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /login. No auto-login occurs. Protected content is not accessible.

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when Supabase signOut() call fails
Precondition: User is authenticated. signOut() will fail (network error).
Steps:
1. Simulate signOut() failure (e.g., disconnect network).
2. Click avatar.
3. Click "Logout".
Expected_Result: An error notification is displayed. User is NOT left in an ambiguous auth state.

Test_Objective: Verify logout behavior when session has already expired
Precondition: User's session token has expired.
Steps:
1. Wait for session to expire.
2. Click avatar.
3. Click "Logout".
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /login. No error occurs.

Test_Objective: Verify avatar click toggles dropdown open and close
Precondition: User is authenticated.
Steps:
1. Click avatar (dropdown opens).
2. Click avatar again (dropdown closes).
3. Click avatar again (dropdown opens).
Expected_Result: Dropdown toggles correctly on each click.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown closes when clicking outside
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps: 1. Click on any area outside the dropdown and avatar.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes. No navigation or action occurs.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown closes when Escape key is pressed
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps: 1. Press the Escape key.
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes. Focus returns to the avatar trigger.

Test_Objective: Verify ArrowDown moves focus between menu items
Precondition: Dropdown is open via keyboard.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown via keyboard.
2. Press ArrowDown.
Expected_Result: Focus moves from Profile to Logout. ArrowDown on last item wraps to first or stops.

Test_Objective: Verify ArrowUp moves focus between menu items
Precondition: Dropdown is open. Focus is on Logout.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Navigate to Logout.
3. Press ArrowUp.
Expected_Result: Focus moves from Logout to Profile.

Test_Objective: Verify pressing Enter on a focused menu item activates it
Precondition: Dropdown is open. Profile is focused.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Focus on Profile.
3. Press Enter.
Expected_Result: User navigates to /profile. Dropdown closes.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown container has role=menu
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Inspect the container element.
Expected_Result: Container has role=""menu"".

Test_Objective: Verify menu items have role=menuitem
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown.
2. Inspect Profile and Logout elements.
Expected_Result: Both items have role=""menuitem"".

Test_Objective: Verify avatar trigger has correct aria-expanded attribute
Precondition: User is authenticated.
Steps:
1. Inspect avatar element (dropdown closed).
2. Click avatar.
3. Inspect avatar element (dropdown open).
Expected_Result: aria-expanded="false" when closed. aria-expanded="true" when open.

Test_Objective: Verify no duplicate signOut calls on rapid clicks
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps: 1. Rapidly click "Logout" multiple times.
Expected_Result: signOut() is called only once. User is redirected to /login without errors.

Test_Objective: Verify no duplicate navigations on rapid clicks
Precondition: Dropdown is open.
Steps: 1. Rapidly click "Profile" multiple times.
Expected_Result: Navigation to /profile occurs once. No errors or duplicate page loads.

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown works correctly after navigating between pages
Precondition: User is authenticated.
Steps:
1. Open dropdown on home page and close it.
2. Navigate to another page.
3. Open dropdown again.
Expected_Result: Dropdown opens correctly on each page. Active state reflects current page.
